recipe.title: Beef Dumpling Stew
steps: Heat oil and butter in an ovenproof casserole. Fry beef until browned on all sides.
Sprinkle over flour and cook for a further 2-3 minutes.
Add garlic and all the vegetables and fry for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in wine, stock, herbs, Worcestershire sauce, and balsamic vinegar. Season with salt and pepper.
Cover with lid and transfer to a 325°F oven. Cook for about 2.5 hours.
Meanwhile, prepare dumplings: mix 6 tbsp self-raising flour, 3 tbsp butter, and enough water to form a dough. Shape into 8 balls.
Remove lid, place dumplings on top of stew, and cook uncovered for final 20 minutes until dumplings are golden.
